unclaimedParcels.title: Unclaimed Parcels
unclaimedParcels.description: Browse parcels found at our branches that have not yet been identified. If you recognize yours, visit the branch to claim it.
unclaimedParcels.emptyBody: There are no unidentified parcels listed at this time.
unclaimedParcels.detailHint: Visit the branch with this reference to identify and claim your parcel.

sidebar.moreHubDescription: Shortcuts grouped under More in the sidebar.
sidebar.moreHubEmpty: No additional shortcuts for your role.

common.scopeFleetVsCarriersNote: Local agency operations are centered on fleet—your own vehicles and GPS trackers. International operations are centered on carriers—linehaul partners; capture airline, ocean, or forwarding references on manifests and schedules.

moreHub.insightDescription: Operational snapshot for your scope: shipments, revenue trends, and recorded cash for the selected period.
moreHub.insightLimited: Sign in with an agency account to see full operational metrics.

waybillUsageReport.title: Waybill usage (per-shipment billing)
waybillUsageReport.description: Your agency has one subscription. On per-waybill plans, each new shipment is metered; amounts below are for your whole agency.
waybillUsageReport.agencyScopeNote: Subscription is per agency, not per branch. The branch column only shows which office created each shipment.
waybillUsageReport.branchBreakdownHint: Breakdown by branch (reporting only — not separate subscriptions)
waybillUsageReport.monthlyPlanBody: Your agency is on a flat monthly plan. Platform fees are invoiced each billing period, not per waybill. Use Finance → subscription invoices instead of this report.

dashboard.title: Operational Overview
dashboard.description: Real-time statistics and overview of your agency's operations.

globalSearch.noResultsHint: Try tracking number, customer name, phone, email, or cargo description

settings.apiBackendHint: This app loads data from this backend base URL.
settings.profileDesc: Manage your personal information and account details.
settings.organizationDesc: Manage your agency profile and public information.
settings.notificationsDesc: Choose what notifications you receive and how.
settings.languageDesc: Choose your preferred language for the application.
settings.addressesDesc: Manage physical locations and collection points for this branch.
settings.receiptDesc: Customize the layout of printed receipts.
settings.smsDesc: Control text messages sent to senders and receivers via Instanvi Notifications.
settings.documentsReceiptDesc: Default shipping label and receipt layout for your agency.
settings.documentsInvoiceDesc: Choose the invoice PDF layout used for shipment billing.
settings.documentsManifestDesc: Choose how consolidation manifests are printed and shared.

sms.title: SMS messaging
sms.subtitle: Enable transactional SMS when shipments are created, arrive, or are delivered.
sms.integrationHint: SMS uses your agency Instanvi Notifications integration (Configuration → Instanvi Integrations). Toggles apply to notifications sent on your account.

receipt.title: Receipt & label templates
receipt.subtitle: Select the default layout for printed labels and receipts.
receipt.layoutDesc: This layout is used when staff print labels from shipments or the print labels page.

layouts.freightDesc: Ntigi freight label with CNEE, barcode, and route.
layouts.standardDesc: Ship-from / ship-to sheet with logo and barcode.
layouts.detailedDesc: Full mobile-style label with handling icons.
layouts.dualDesc: Two identical labels on one sheet.

invoice.title: Invoice layouts
invoice.subtitle: Choose the default layout for shipment invoices and PDF exports.

layouts.defaultDesc: Carrier rate confirmation — standard NTIGI invoice.
layouts.commercialDesc: Full commercial invoice with line items and branding.

manifest.title: Manifest layouts
manifest.subtitle: Choose how consolidation manifests appear when printed or exported.

layouts.webDesc: Full A4 manifest with all shipment details.
layouts.mobileDesc: Compact layout for phones and narrow screens.
layouts.printDesc: Clean print layout for office printers.
layouts.receiptDesc: Minimal strip suitable for receipt printers.

profile.genericError: An error occurred while updating your profile
profile.passwordMismatch: New password and confirmation do not match
profile.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 6 characters long
profile.missingIdentifier: You must have an email or phone number to update your password.
profile.verifyDescriptionEmail: We've sent a verification code to your email. Please enter it below to update your password.
profile.verifyDescriptionPhone: We've sent a verification code to your phone. Please enter it below to update your password.
profile.languageDescription: Choose your preferred language for the application.
profile.notificationsDescription: Get alerts on this device for important events.
profile.googleDescription: Connect your Google account for easier login.

organization.logoHint: This logo will appear on your dashboard and generated documents.
organization.slugHint: This is your unique address on the platform.
organization.baseCurrencyHint: All other currency rates will be defined relative to this base.
organization.genericError: An error occurred while updating the agency profile

notifications.browserSubtitle: Receive desktop alerts even when the tab is inactive.
notifications.browserEnabledHint: You will receive browser notifications for the in-app events enabled below.
notifications.browserDisabledHint: Click Enable to request browser notification permission.
notifications.pushSubtitle: Get push alerts on this device for important events.
notifications.pushEnabledHint: Push notifications are active. You will be alerted on this device.
notifications.pushDisabledHint: Enable push notifications to receive alerts directly on this device.
notifications.browserPermissionDenied: Browser permission denied. Please allow it in your browser settings.
notifications.smsSubtitle: Text messages sent to senders and receivers via Instanvi.
notifications.saveFailed: Failed to save preferences. Please try again.

inAppNewShipments.title: New Shipments
inAppNewShipments.desc: When a new shipment is created at your branch.

inAppPackageArrivals.title: Package Arrivals
inAppPackageArrivals.desc: When a package arrives at your branch.

inAppPaymentReceived.title: Payment Received
inAppPaymentReceived.desc: When a payment is recorded for a shipment.

inAppManifestUpdates.title: Manifest Updates
inAppManifestUpdates.desc: When a manifest is dispatched or arrives.

smsSenderConfirmation.title: Sender Confirmation
smsSenderConfirmation.desc: SMS sent to sender when shipment is created.

smsReceiverAlert.title: Receiver Alert
smsReceiverAlert.desc: SMS sent to receiver when package arrives at destination.

smsDeliveryConfirmation.title: Delivery Confirmation
smsDeliveryConfirmation.desc: SMS sent to sender & receiver on delivery.

receipt.layoutDesc: The selected layout is printed when staff print shipment receipts.
receipt.freightDesc: Ntigi sea / air — CNEE, barcode, ports or express weights.
receipt.standardDesc: Ship-from / ship-to sheet with logo and tracking barcode.
receipt.headerDesc: Small text displayed above the agency name.
receipt.footerPlaceholder: e.g. Thank you for your business! Items are insured up to...
receipt.footerDesc: Important notices or thanks at the bottom of the receipt.

addresses.title: Branch Addresses
addresses.description: Manage physical locations and collection points for this branch.
addresses.name: Location Name
addresses.noAddressesDesc: Add your first branch sub-location to start using it.
addresses.deleteDesc: Are you sure you want to delete this address? This action cannot be undone.

shipments.title: Shipments
shipments.description: Manage all shipments across the agency.

spaceBookingActions.rejectDesc: The customer will not get a shipment from this reservation. You can add an optional note.

shipments.noMatchesDesc: We couldn't find any shipments matching "{search}".
shipments.noDataDesc: Your agency hasn't recorded any shipments yet. Get started by creating your first shipment.
shipments.noSpaceBookingsDesc: Network Explorer corridor reservations appear here under Bookings.
shipments.archiveDesc: Are you sure you want to archive shipment {trackingNo}? This action can be reversed later.

bookings.title: Bookings
bookings.description: Network explorer bookings: shipments your agency created for partner agencies, and bookings partners created that involve your branches.
bookings.emptySentDesc: When you confirm a shipment from the network explorer to a partner corridor, it appears here.
bookings.emptyReceivedDesc: When another agency books the network and your branch is on the corridor, those shipments appear here.

incomingShipments.title: Incoming Shipments
incomingShipments.pageDescription: Manage shipments arriving at your branch. Receive and deliver packages to customers.

processActions.receiveConfirm: Are you sure you want to mark shipment {trackingNo} as received at this branch?
processActions.deliverConfirm: Mark shipment {trackingNo} as handed off to the customer?
processActions.successReceiveDesc: Shipment {trackingNo} has been marked as received at this branch.
processActions.successDeliverDesc: Shipment {trackingNo} has been successfully cleared and delivered.
processActions.successDispatchDesc: Shipment {trackingNo} has been handed off to the customer.

scanner.bannerDesc: Scan once to receive at this branch. Scan the same label again when status is Received to hand off to the customer.
scanner.wrongBranchDesc: This shipment is not destined for your branch. Please verify the tracking number.
scanner.alreadyDeliveredDesc: Shipment {trackingNo} has already been delivered to the recipient.
scanner.cannotProcessDesc: Shipment {trackingNo} is {status} and cannot be scanned here.
scanner.notFoundDesc: Shipment with tracking number {trackingNo} was not found in the system.

notificationsPage.title: Notifications
notificationsPage.description: Stay updated with your shipment activities and system alerts.
notificationsPage.clearAllDesc: Are you sure you want to clear all your notifications? This action cannot be undone.
notificationsPage.noNotificationsDesc: You're all caught up! New notifications will appear here.

createShipment.title: Create Shipment
createShipment.pageDescription: Register a new shipment: packages first, then sender and receiver, logistics, and payment.
createShipment.pricingModeLabel: How should we price this shipment?
createShipment.pricingModeQuoteHint: Use rated pricing from the route (recommended for international and configured corridors). The total updates from weight, dimensions, and package type.
createShipment.pricingModeManualHint: Enter your own total in XAF. The server will not override it — use this for local desks with their own tariffs.
createShipment.shipmentCostManualHint: This amount is charged as-is. Switch to corridor quote if you want rated line items from the route.
createShipment.paymentManualPricingHint: Corridor rated breakdown is hidden while agency pricing is selected. Switch to corridor quote to see the live breakdown.
createShipment.lastMileSearchPlaceHint: Powered by open geocoding (Photon). Pick a result to fill address and coordinates.
createShipment.lastMileDescription: Optional landline or alternate number for the consignee, and door-delivery details after the route destination.
createShipment.receiverLandlineHint: Saved with the shipment as a note for drivers. Use international format.
createShipment.lastMileDeliveryHint: When enabled, we store the final address, map hint, and optional voice note with the shipment (same as mobile).
createShipment.lastMileDeliveryModeHint: Only catalog rows marked as last-mile types appear here. Choosing one turns on door delivery for this shipment.
createShipment.lastMileDirectionsPlaceholder: e.g. Ring the office landline, gate code, building name…
createShipment.savedClientAddressPlaceholder: Choose a client to fill phone, name, email, and address
createShipment.savedClientAddressEmpty: No saved clients yet. Add clients under Clients, or type details manually.
createShipment.savedClientAddressHint: Uses your agency’s client directory (same records as the phone suggestions below).
createShipment.optionalExtrasHint: Open this section when you need email, a written address, or last-mile pickup/delivery details.
createShipment.addressOptionalHint: Optional for hub-to-hub moves. Required when last-mile delivery is enabled.
createShipment.addressLastMileHint: We need a full pickup/delivery address for door-to-door last mile.
createShipment.packageTypeBannerTitle: Start with what you are shipping
createShipment.packageTypeBannerBody: Choose an agency package category or describe your own items below. After sender and receiver, you will pick the corridor, advanced logistics, and payment.
createShipment.advancedLogisticsDescription: Templates, branch catalogs, and inspection metadata from Configuration. Multi-select fields use searchable chips (arrow keys in list, Enter to toggle).
createShipment.packageEntryModeLabel: How do you want to enter this shipment?
createShipment.packageShipmentTypeHintPreset: This is the primary category used for corridor quotes. You can still override per line below.
createShipment.packageShipmentTypeHintCustom: Pick the closest category for rating, then describe each item, weight, and dimensions in the lines below.
createShipment.packageTypeNoRatedForRoute: This route has no matching rated package types. Configure package rates for this corridor in admin pricing, or pick another route.
createShipment.packageLinePackageTypeHint: Defaults to the shipment package type above. Override when an item is rated differently.
createShipment.lastMileRequiresAddresses: Make sure sender and receiver addresses on earlier steps are filled — they are required for last-mile delivery.
createShipment.pickupAddressHint: Optional — use when collection is not the same as the sender address.
createShipment.pickupInstructionsPlaceholder: Contact on site, loading bay, security, etc.

receipt.title: receipt
receipt.barcodeHelp: Present this tracking code to agents to easily locate this package.
receipt.shipmentRegistered: Shipment has been successfully registered with tracking ID
receipt.disclaimer: Keep this receipt safe for tracking. Not liable for undeclared fragile items. Contact customer service within 24hrs for inquiries.

GENERAL_MANAGER.name: General Manager
GENERAL_MANAGER.description: Executive level access with oversight across all agency branches and corporate operations.

MANAGER.name: Manager
MANAGER.description: Full access to branch operations, staff management, and financial reporting for the assigned branch.

AGENT.name: Agent
AGENT.description: Front-desk operations, shipment registration, package reception, and customer service.

DRIVER.name: Driver
DRIVER.description: Access to trips, delivery routes, and real-time status updates for ongoing shipments.

SYSTEM_ADMIN.name: System Admin
SYSTEM_ADMIN.description: Top-level administration across all agencies, multitenancy management, and global system configurations.

routes.title: Pricing routes
routes.description: Create origin–destination corridors with a default unit price (XAF). These power route quotes, chargeable weight, and network pricing — configure them here, not when creating a shipment.
routes.emptyDescription: Create corridors from My Shipping Rates → Costing. Saved routes appear here for reference and editing.
routes.searchPlaceholder: Search by route name, branch, or transport mode…
routes.emptySearchDescription: Try another name, city, or mode — or clear the search to see all routes.
routes.name: Route Name

routeForm.name: Route Name (e.g. Douala - Yaoundé)
routeForm.legsSectionHint: With no hubs, one leg is stored (origin → destination). With hubs, set the mode for each segment into that hub, then the final segment to destination. The corridor’s saved mode is MULTIMODAL when segments differ; otherwise it matches the single mode used. Return route is mirrored automatically.
routeForm.legsModeHintDirect: Applies to the single leg from origin to destination.
routeForm.legsModeHintFinal: Mode for the last leg only, after all intermediate hubs.
routeForm.noHubsYet: No extra hubs — single leg from origin to destination.
routeForm.legsEditHint: Legs are fixed after creation. Change stops by deleting this route and creating a new corridor, or update legs via the API.

trips.title: Trips
trips.description: Schedule trips with your fleet. For international linehaul, add carrier details on manifests and schedules.

voyages.title: Schedules
voyages.description: Plan international carrier moves with origin, destination, transit mode, and references (AWB, B/L, container).
voyages.emptyDescription: Create a schedule to track linehaul legs, cut-offs, and carrier references.
voyages.errorDescription: Check your connection and try again.

wizard.addressPredictivePlaceholder: Search or pick from saved stops…
wizard.stopsEmptyHint: No saved stops match — add branches or keep typing.
wizard.transitModeTripHint: Like a trip, this schedules a leg. Pick how cargo moves — the form shows the right carrier references.
wizard.flightLookupHint: Enter at least 3 characters — we fill airline and times when the flight is found.

pool.emptyWarehouse: No shipments checked into this warehouse

planner.manifestEmpty: No shipments on this manifest yet. Add from the consignment list with + Load.
planner.manifestEmptySearch: No manifest rows match your search.

consolidations.title: Consolidations
consolidations.emptyDescription: Create a consolidation to start planning grouped movements.
consolidations.errorDescription: Check your connection and try again.

wizard.addressPredictivePlaceholder: Search or pick from saved stops…
wizard.stopsEmptyHint: No saved stops match — add branches or keep typing.
wizard.transitModeConsolidationHint: Choose how this consolidation moves. The form will show matching carrier/reference fields.
wizard.flightLookupHint: Enter at least 3 characters — airline and times auto-fill when found.
wizard.maxPayloadPlaceholder: Overrides vehicle default for manifest capacity

tripForm.stopsEmptyHint: No saved branches match — add stops under Branches or keep typing.

packagesCatalog.title: Packages
packagesCatalog.description: All package lines on consignments your agency handles (same branch visibility as your shipment list).
packagesCatalog.searchPlaceholder: Search package number, waybill, or description…
packagesCatalog.adminNeedsAgency: An agency context is required to list package lines.
packagesCatalog.noAgency: Sign in with an agency account to load packages.
packagesCatalog.errorDescription: Check your connection and try again.
packagesCatalog.emptyDescription: No lines match your search, or no consignments touch your branches yet.

packages.title: Package Categories
packages.description: Define sizes, types and pricing rules for shipments.
packages.scopeAgency: Agency catalog for {agency} — same types are available at every branch.
packages.scopeBranch: Branch context: {branch} — package types are defined at agency level.
packages.noPackagesDesc: Add your first package type to enable shipping.
packages.searchPlaceholder: Search by name or handling notes…
packages.errorDescription: Check your connection and try again.
packages.deleteDescription: Shipments already using this type may be affected. This cannot be undone.
packages.deleteErrorDescription: Something went wrong. Try again or contact support.

packageForm.label: Label (e.g. Small Envelope, Furniture)
packageForm.defaultsHint: When staff pick this type (or use shipment default), these sizes prefill package lines and feed volume for rated quotes.
packageForm.volumetricHint: Optional. If set, chargeable volumetric weight for this type uses this divisor instead of the route default (e.g. 5000 for air).

transactions.title: Shipment Payment
transactions.invalidTracking: Please provide a valid tracking number

fleet.title: Fleet Management
fleet.description: Register vehicles and trackers for local and last-mile work. International legs use carrier references on manifests and schedules.
fleet.noVehiclesDesc: Add your first vehicle to the agency fleet.

vehicleForm.trackableDesc: This vehicle has GPS tracking hardware installed.

tracking.title: Track Package
tracking.subtitle: Real-time updates for your cargo.
tracking.identityDesc: For security, please enter the Phone Number of the sender or receiver.
tracking.notFoundDesc: We couldn't find a record for {trackingNo}.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Enter your registered email or phone number to access your agency dashboard.
login.activationMessage: Your account is registered but needs to be secured with a personalized password.

verify.title: Verification Required
verify.subtitle: A security code has been sent to
verify.back: Use a different number or email

password.title: Enter password
password.subtitle: Almost there! Enter your password to finish.

register.title: Register your agency
register.agencySubtitle: Set up your agency on NTIGI to start managing shipments.
register.managerSubtitle: Set up the manager who will run this agency.

forgotPassword.title: Reset your password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkEmailMessage: We've sent a password reset link to your email address. Check your inbox and follow the instructions.

setPassword.title: Verify identity
setPassword.subtitle: Enter your registered phone number or email to receive a code.
setPassword.verifySubtitle: Enter the 6-digit code we sent to
setPassword.finishSubtitle: Establish a secure password for your agency dashboard.

errors.authFailed: Authentication failed. Please check your credentials and try again.

subscriptionPlans.title: Subscription plans
subscriptionPlans.description: Per-shipment plans can charge different rates for local vs international waybills (by stop countries, or air/sea routes when countries are missing). Monthly plans use a flat recurring fee.

form.billingModelHint: Per shipment: meter each new waybill for the whole agency. Monthly: one flat fee per agency each billing period (included branches is a capacity limit, not a separate subscription per branch).
form.name: Name
form.invoicePeriodHint: How you typically invoice usage (e.g. sum all waybills each month). Does not change the per-waybill rate.
form.billingCycleHint: How often the flat subscription fee applies (monthly or yearly).
form.pricePerWaybillHint: Applies when origin and destination are in the same country (or the shipment is classified as local).
form.pricePerWaybillInternationalPlaceholder: Leave empty to use local rate
form.pricePerWaybillInternationalHint: When set, used for cross-border bookings and for international-style corridors (e.g. air/sea) when country codes are missing.
form.monthlyFlatHint: Invoice this amount each period; extra branches can use the overage rate.

agencySubscription.title: Subscription — {name}
agencySubscription.description: One subscription for this agency. Choose per-waybill or monthly billing, then manage invoices and payments.
agencySubscription.agencyScopeNote: Billing applies to the whole agency. Branches are not billed separately; branch limits on a plan only cap how many offices the agency may operate.
agencySubscription.planWaybillRate: This plan: {amount} {currency} per waybill (metered on each new shipment).
agencySubscription.planWaybillScopeHint: International is when origin and destination countries differ, or when mode is air/sea (or the route name suggests international) if countries are not set on stops.

returnsModule.title: Returns
returnsModule.description: Look up a consignment by tracking number and record a return with reasons (same flow as the mobile app).
returnsModule.lookupError: Shipment not found. Check the number and try again.
returnsModule.toastAlreadyReturned: This shipment is already marked as returned.
returnsModule.toastLookupRequired: Enter a valid tracking number first.
returnsModule.toastReasonsRequired: Select at least one return reason.

manifestGoodsModule.title: Manifest goods
manifestGoodsModule.description: Attach or remove parcels on a schedule manifest (linehaul), matching the mobile manifest flow.
manifestGoodsModule.emptyManifest: No parcels on this manifest yet.
manifestGoodsModule.toastNoManifest: This schedule has no manifest yet. Create or refresh the schedule.

printLabelsModule.title: Print labels
printLabelsModule.description: Print shipping labels for recent agency shipments (browser print / PDF).
printLabelsModule.noAgency: Sign in with an agency account to load shipments.
printLabelsModule.empty: No shipments to show on this page.
printLabelsModule.emptyDesc: Agency shipments appear here. Use search (4+ characters) to find a waybill.
printLabelsModule.emptySearchDesc: Try another waybill or fewer characters in the tracking number.
printLabelsModule.searchHint: Search runs on the server. Enter at least 4 characters to filter by waybill; leave shorter to browse the latest page by page.

warehouseCheckInModule.title: Warehouse check-in
warehouseCheckInModule.description: Put away a package line into a bin (same as mobile warehouse check-in).
warehouseCheckInModule.noSites: No warehouse site is configured yet. Create one from Warehouse Management.
warehouseCheckInModule.binHint: Enter the bin code shown on your floor plan or label.
warehouseCheckInModule.noPackages: Enter a valid tracking number to list package lines.
warehouseCheckInModule.toastNoPackage: Load a shipment and select a package line.

portCalls.title: Port Calls
portCalls.empty: No itinerary stops for this trip yet.
portCalls.helpBody: Estimated columns show planned arrival and departure at each stop. Actual columns fill in as the schedule is executed (ShipsGo air/ocean GeoJSON when the trip is linked). Teal indicates on-time, red indicates late, and a white marker means the timestamp is not yet available.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.description: You do not have the necessary permissions to view this page. This area is restricted to authorized personnel.

search.corridorsFound: {count, plural, one {# corridor found} other {# corridors found}}
search.noFilterResultsDesc: Try widening the price range, choosing a different duration or transport mode, or clearing the expiration date.
search.emptyDescription: We couldn't define a route between {origin} and {destination}. Check spelling or contact support for custom routing.

card.noActiveVoyage: No active schedule on this corridor
card.noActiveVoyageDesc: Booking opens when a schedule is published on this route.

confirm.missingStopsTitle: Missing corridor stops. Start from the network explorer.
confirm.sessionExpiredTitle: Booking session expired. Search the network and choose Book Now again.
confirm.loadRoutesError: Could not load corridor routes for these stops.
confirm.noRouteTitle: No route found for this origin and destination pair.
confirm.sessionExpiredToastDesc: Search again and choose Book Now before confirming.

summary.title: Confirm Booking
summary.termsFallback: Standard corridor terms apply. Full conditions will be provided upon shipment finalization.
summary.goodsReadyEmpty: Add cargo details in the network explorer

booker.title: Complete your booking
booker.description: Provide contact details for the booker, sender, and receiver.
booker.bookingAsAgency: I am booking on behalf of my agency
booker.bookingAsAgencyHint: Your agency will be recorded as the forwarder for this corridor booking.
booker.senderSectionHint: Who is handing over the goods for pickup.
booker.receiverSectionHint: Who will receive the goods at destination.
booker.validationNamePhone: Please provide your name and phone number.
booker.validationAgencyRequired: Sign in with an agency account to book on behalf of your agency.

accessDenied.title: Access denied
accessDenied.description: You do not have permission to view this page. Contact your administrator if you need access.

apiKeys.integrationHint: Choose which Instanvi service these credentials connect to.
apiKeys.integrationLockedHint: Integration type cannot be changed after creation. Add a new row for another service.
apiKeys.instanviNotificationsDesc: SMS and email notifications for shipments and customers.
apiKeys.instanviPayDesc: Mobile money collections and payment processing.
apiKeys.notesPlaceholder: Where is this used? Who owns it?
apiKeys.enabledHint: Disabled credentials cannot be used by the system

shipment-particulars.label: Shipment Particulars
shipment-particulars.description: Define shipment particulars and declaration requirements

shipment-types.label: Shipment Types
shipment-types.description: Standard, Express, Priority and other shipment modes

warehouse-types.label: Warehouse Types
warehouse-types.description: Cold storage, Bonded, General and other warehouse categories

location-currencies.description: Set default currencies and exchange rates for regions

incoterms.description: International Commercial Terms rules for trade

shipment-clauses.label: Shipment Clauses
shipment-clauses.description: Legal shipment clauses and trade terms

rate-classes.label: Rate Classes
rate-classes.description: Financial and tagging classifications for weight-based rates

customer-categories.label: Customer Categories
customer-categories.description: Segment customers by type for targeted pricing

transportation-types.label: Transportation Types
transportation-types.description: Air, Sea, Road, Rail and multimodal transport modes

vehicle-types.label: Vehicle Types
vehicle-types.description: Van, 10-wheeler, trailer and other vehicle classes

vessel-types.label: Vessel Types
vessel-types.description: Container ship, bulk carrier, tanker classifications

ports.label: Ports
ports.description: Sea, air and inland port management

carriers.label: Carriers
carriers.description: Transport carrier companies and their identifiers

awb-stock.label: AWB Stock
awb-stock.description: Air Waybill stock level tracking and management

delivery-types.label: Delivery Types
delivery-types.description: Door-to-door, Hub-to-Hub and other delivery models

delivery-areas.label: Delivery Areas
delivery-areas.description: Geographical delivery zones and postal code ranges

delivery-modes.label: Delivery Modes
delivery-modes.description: Fixed delivery-mode types (branch handoff vs last mile). Last-mile kinds appear on shipment door-delivery.

partner-agencies.label: Partner Agencies
partner-agencies.description: External partner logistics agencies (DHL, FedEx, etc.)

vendors.label: Vendors
vendors.description: External service vendors (fuel, parts, leasing, etc.)

inspection-statuses.label: Inspection Statuses
inspection-statuses.description: Pending, Cleared, Held and other status codes

job-categories.label: Job Categories
job-categories.description: High-level categorization for jobs and projects

job-sub-categories.label: Job Sub Categories
job-sub-categories.description: Detailed sub-classification for jobs within a category

process-templates.label: Process Templates
process-templates.description: Manage hierarchical workflows and logistics processes

document-types.label: Document Types
document-types.description: Passport, license, invoice and other document types

document-categories.label: Document Categories
document-categories.description: Organize documents into structured category folders

document-validators.label: Validators
document-validators.description: Manage document validation hierarchy and required roles

validation-levels.label: Validation Levels
validation-levels.description: Define the sequence of validation steps for documents

charges.label: Charges
charges.description: Define service charges, fees and their calculation methods

banks.label: Banks
banks.description: Partner and company bank account management

charge-modes.label: Charge Modes
charge-modes.description: Prepaid, postpaid, credit and other charge modes

account-types.label: Account Types
account-types.description: Silver, Gold, Enterprise and other account classifications

api-keys.label: Instanvi Integrations
api-keys.description: Connect Instanvi Notifications and Instanvi Pay for your agency

shared.name: Name
shared.newSubtitle: Add a new {type} to your configuration
shared.deleteDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"? This action cannot be undone and may affect related records.
